logger.doc:name: Start Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: started registration covid case flow, #[payload]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { source: payload.source, caseType: payload.caseType, firstName: payload.firstName, lastName: payload.lastName, phone: payload.phone, email: payload.email, dateOfBirth: payload.dateOfBirth as String{format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}, nationalID: payload.nationalID, nationalIDType: payload.nationalIDType, streetAddress : payload.address.streetAddress, city: payload.address.city, state: upper(payload.address.state), postal: payload.address.postal, country: payload.address.country, createdAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}, updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}, createdBy: "UHIS", updatedBy: "UHIS"
}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "registrationId": payload[0].GENERATED_KEY as String, "message": "Created Successfully" }

logger.doc:name: End Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Ended Subflow registration covid case flow, #[payload]
